name: ingest-instagram-nightly
_fix_notes: NEW FILE — Instagram split from the combined ingest-meta-nightly workflow
1. Base URL: graph.facebook.com (NOT graph.instagram.com — that is legacy Basic Display API)
2. Correct Instagram metric names for Business/Creator accounts via v18+:
3. Correct period: day with since/until unix timestamps for yesterday's window
5. Init - Channel State preserves channel_id after HTTP call
6. IF gate on API success before Transform
7. platform field included in DB upsert
9. Failure log path separate from success
account_id must be the Instagram Business Account numeric ID (not @handle)

parameters.query: SELECT id AS channel_id, account_id, access_token FROM channels WHERE platform = 'instagram' AND connected_status = 'connected';

INSERT INTO post_metrics (
  channel_id, platform, metric_date,
  reach, impressions, engagements, clicks,
  likes, comments, shares, saves,
  video_views, watch_time_seconds, profile_visits, follower_count,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.engagements }}, {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.video_views }}, {{ $json.watch_time_seconds }}, {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.follower_count }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  reach          = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions    = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  engagements    = EXCLUDED.engagements,
  profile_visits = EXCLUDED.profile_visits,
  follower_count = EXCLUDED.follower_count,
  created_at     = EXCLUDED.created_at;

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'success',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-instagram-nightly", metrics_count: $input.all().length }) }}',
  now());

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'failure',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-instagram-nightly", error: $json.error }) }}',
  now());
